lasagne.title: Granny's Lasagne
ingredients: Meat: 1 lb (500g) ground beef (or a mix of beef and pork)
Veggies: 1 onion, 2 cloves of garlic, 1 large carrot, and 1 zucchini (finely diced or grated)
Sauce: 24 oz (700ml) marinara or pasta sauce, 1 tbsp tomato paste
Cheese: 2 cups (400g) shredded mozzarella, ½ cup (50g) grated parmesan
Creamy Layer: 15 oz (500g) ricotta cheese mixed with 1 egg
preparation: Brown the Meat & Veggies: Heat oil in a large skillet. Brown the ground beef until cooked through. Add the onion, carrots, and zucchini, and sauté for about 5 minutes until softened.
Simmer the Sauce: Stir in the tomato paste, garlic, and pasta sauce. Season with salt, pepper, and Italian herbs. Let it simmer for 10–15 minutes.
Prepare the Cheese Mix: In a small bowl, stir together the ricotta and the egg until smooth.

Layer the Lasagna:
  • Spread a thin layer of meat sauce on the bottom of a baking dish.
  • Place a layer of lasagna sheets on top.
  • Spread a layer of the ricotta mixture, then meat sauce, and a sprinkle of mozzarella.
  • Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used, ending with a thick layer of meat sauce, mozzarella, and parmesan on top.
lasagne.pro-tip: Let the lasagna rest for 10–15 minutes before slicing. This helps the layers stay together when serving.
